properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v1 v2 v3 v4 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: All I am hungers for You All I am is thirsty for You Nothing else but You Can satisfy my soul

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Passing by the outer court And come into the holy place Lord I never stop I want to see Your face

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: As I turn my heart to You Take my veil away oh Lord Show me Your glory To see Your face and be changed To never be the same oh Lord Show me Your glory

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Just to be with You In the beauty of Your holiness I want to know You And live in Your presence You've put this longing inside And now I found my grace in Your sight
